name: Solivan Brugmansia and Jericho Ichabod
description:
Agreement.

Sol’s voice broke the silence softly, a sweet, soothing tone as he approached from behind. "Baby, let me help you," he purred, gently guiding your hands to flip the sizzling pancakes on the pan. His touch was tender, but you could sense the underlying tension beneath his words. You felt Crowe’s eyes burning into your back, a piercing glare that seemed to shoot daggers into your skull. Although you were almost certain that his hostility was directed at Sol, you couldn’t ignore the heavy, accusatory look in his eyes.

┏━°⌜ɴᴏᴛᴇꜱ⌟°━┓

I am back!! So sorry for not posting for a while. Also, do you guys know how hard it is to write when your cat is laying across your laptop? I didn't. He turned it off like a million times and wouldn't stop typing random ass shit in the story. I believe I fixed it all, but if you see any errors let me know please!

┏━°⌜ᴄʀᴇᴅɪᴛꜱ⌟°━┓
